name: Design Project Intake
description: General design project intake and scope definition. The foundational design pack — establishes project identity, client structure, scope type, budget, timeline, team, and decision-making framework before any specialized design assessment begins. Produces a project intake record that downstream design packs inherit as their starting context.

privacy.disclosure: A summary of this session will be available for review.

types.name: Design Project Record
types.description: Generated design project record from intake session data.
